nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_enable
nml_option.description: If true, sea ice analysis member fmeSeaiceDerivedFields is called.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_compute_interval
nml_option.description: Timestamp determining how often analysis member computation should be performed.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_output_stream
nml_option.description: Name of the stream that the fmeSeaiceDerivedFields analysis member should be tied to.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_compute_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member computation occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_write_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member write occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_stream_output_interval
nml_option.description: Output interval for the fmeSeaiceDerivedFields stream. Format: YY-MM-DD_HH:MM:SS
nml_option.possible_values: Any valid MPAS time interval string

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_horiz_remap_file
nml_option.description: Path to ESMF/TempestRemap weight file for horizontal remapping of sea ice derived fields to lat-lon grid.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeSeaiceDerivedFields_time_averaging
nml_option.description: If true, remapped output fields are time-averaged over the output interval instead of instantaneous. Set compute_interval to a frequent value (e.g. dt) when enabling.

package.name: fmeSeaiceDerivedFieldsAMPKG
package.description: This package includes variables required for the fmeSeaiceDerivedFields analysis member.

var.name: iceAreaTotal
var.description: Total ice area fraction summed over categories

var.name: iceVolumeTotal
var.description: Total ice volume per unit grid cell area summed over categories

var.name: snowVolumeTotal
var.description: Total snow volume per unit grid cell area summed over categories

var.name: airStressZonal
var.description: Zonal component of air stress on ice in geographical coordinates

var.name: airStressMeridional
var.description: Meridional component of air stress on ice in geographical coordinates

var.name: uVelocityGeoCell
var.description: True eastwards sea-ice velocity at cell centers (vertex velocities interpolated to cells, then rotated from native MPAS frame to geographic frame)

var.name: vVelocityGeoCell
var.description: True northwards sea-ice velocity at cell centers (vertex velocities interpolated to cells, then rotated from native MPAS frame to geographic frame)
